Home / About Us / Leadership

Leadership Behind
Our Mission

Seasoned executives and board members guiding strategy, operations, and global partnerships.

View Our Work About Overview
Our People

Experience and vision driving results

GMP is led by construction industry veterans who bring deep expertise in modular manufacturing, project delivery, government contracting, and international development. Together, our leadership team ensures every project benefits from strategic oversight and operational excellence.

Executive Team

The people who lead our work

Fuad Sweiss

Founder & CEO

Founded GMP in 2019 with the objective of improving and perfecting modular building technologies by fostering long-lasting partnerships among developers, architects, engineers, contractors, suppliers, and modular manufacturers worldwide. Based in the San Francisco Bay Area, Fuad brings decades of construction and development expertise to every GMP initiative.

Governance

Board of Directors providing strategic oversight

R

Robert Bilbeisi

Board Chairman

International Development

Leads strategic direction and international expansion initiatives for GMP, drawing on extensive experience in cross-border development partnerships.

D

Dr. Maria Carranza

Board Member

Healthcare Systems

Guides GMP's healthcare division strategy, ensuring modular medical facilities meet the highest clinical and operational standards.

J

James Siri

Board Member

Defense Contracting

Provides oversight on government and DoD programs, ensuring compliance with federal acquisition requirements and security standards.

A

Amb. Ahmed Bulgherini

Board Member

International Relations

Advises on international partnerships and diplomatic relationships that support GMP's global modular construction mission.

Review how GMP's leadership and delivery model support modular programs across markets and sectors.
